title: 7 Herbal Tinctures for Older Adults with Open Pores
description: Calendula officinalis tinctures are a natural remedy that can help with open pores. The reason they're effective is due to the plant's properties and constituents, such as triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and carotenoids. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with open pores.
